About: It is about the re-entry into the sexual playground now defined by technology.
It is about the muddled ways that feelings and self-image are present in that experience.
It is about the years of emotional and sexual turbulence experienced with an ex-partner.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with electroclash.
It is associated with performance art.
It is associated with experimental theater.
It is associated with electroclash music.
It is associated with electropop music.

It is associated with Lo Recordings.
It is associated with FS Studios.

ComposedBy: It was composed by Warren Fischer.
ConsistsOf: It consists of dancers and guest vocalists.
It consists of layered synthesizer lines and drum-machines.
CreatedBy: It was created by Warren Fischer and Casey Spooner.
CreatedFor: It was created for an impromptu rendition of their makeshift track "Indian Cab Driver".
CreatedIn: It was created in New York City.
CreatedTo: It was created to become legitimate entertainment.
FoundedBy: It was founded by Warren Fischer and Casey Spooner.
HasA: It has a debut album titled #1.
It has a second album titled Odyssey.
It has a third full-length album titled Entertainment.
It has an album titled Sir.
It has singles "Sweetness", "Emerge", and a cover of Wire's "the 15th".
It has a lead single "Just Let Go".
It has a second single "Never Win".
It has a single "The Best Revenge".
It has a single "Danse en France".
It has a single "Have Fun Tonight".
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by a performance art piece about entertainment.
It is characterized by songs that were more structured and more accurately described as electropop than electroclash.
It is characterized by a markedly different sound than those heard on their debut album.
It is characterized by a retrospective collage of Reagan-era queer references framed in an undeniably contemporary style.
It is characterized by dated queer references.
It is characterized by layered synthesizer lines and drum-machines that invoke Reagan-era industrial and EBM.
It is characterized by provocative music videos.

About: それはエンターテイメントに関するものです。
それはテクノロジーによって定義された性的プレジャープールへの再参入に関するものです。
